mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oa_task WHERE del_flag = 0 AND handler_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT t.handler_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS completedCount FROM oa_task t WHERE t.status = 'completed' AND t.handler_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.handler_name, t.handler_id ORDER BY completedCount DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT MAX(task_no) FROM oa_task WHERE del_flag = 0
